title: Shopping Cart Management Flow
interaction_flow: alt [session invalid or usertype != customer] → redirect login.jsp
ProductServiceImpl → Database: SELECT * FROM products WHERE prodid=?
AddtoCart → CartServiceImpl: getProductCount(userId, prodId) → int cartQty
CartServiceImpl → Database: SELECT sum(quantity) FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
alt [pQty == cartQty → requested qty was 0, remove item]
AddtoCart → CartServiceImpl: removeProductFromCart(userId, prodId) → String status
CartServiceImpl → Database: SELECT * FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
alt [prodQuantity - 1 > 0] → Database: UPDATE usercart SET quantity=? WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
alt [prodQuantity - 1 <= 0] → Database: DELETE FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
AddtoCart → Customer: include userHome.jsp + status message
CartServiceImpl → Database: SELECT * FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
alt [row exists] → Database: UPDATE usercart SET quantity=? WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
alt [row not exists] → Database: INSERT INTO usercart VALUES(?,?,?)
AddtoCart → DemandServiceImpl: addProduct(new DemandBean(userId, prodId, pQty-availableQty))
AddtoCart → Customer: include cartDetails.jsp + status message
CartServiceImpl → Database: UPDATE or INSERT usercart
AddtoCart → Customer: include userHome.jsp + status message
CartServiceImpl → Database: UPDATE or INSERT usercart
UpdateToCart → DemandServiceImpl: addProduct(new DemandBean(userId, prodId, pQty-availableQty))
UpdateToCart → Customer: include cartDetails.jsp + status message
CartServiceImpl → Database: UPDATE usercart set quantity=pQty OR DELETE if qty==0 OR INSERT if new
UpdateToCart → Customer: include cartDetails.jsp + status message

CartServiceImpl: addProductToCart(String userId, String prodId, int prodQty): String
updateProductToCart(String userId, String prodId, int prodQty): String — UPDATE/INSERT/DELETE usercart
removeProductFromCart(String userId, String prodId): String — decrement qty by 1, DELETE if reaches 0
removeAProduct(String userId, String prodId): boolean — hard DELETE row
getProductCount(String userId, String prodId): int — SUM(quantity) for one product
CartService (interface): addProductToCart, updateProductToCart, getAllCartItems, getCartCount, getCartItemCount, removeProductFromCart, removeAProduct
DBUtil: provideConnection(): Connection — singleton JDBC connection from application.properties

key_relationships: CartServiceImpl depends_on ProductServiceImpl (internal call in addProductToCart)
CartBean is Serializable POJO: userId, prodId, quantity

queries: SELECT * FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
SELECT sum(quantity) FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
SELECT sum(quantity) FROM usercart WHERE username=?
SELECT quantity FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
UPDATE usercart SET quantity=? WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
DELETE FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?

important_notes: AddtoCart handles both adding new items AND toggling removal (when pQty==cartQty after sum, item was de-selected → removeProductFromCart called)
removeProductFromCart decrements by 1 (not full removal); removeAProduct does full DELETE
updateProductToCart upserts: INSERT if item not in cart, UPDATE if exists, DELETE if qty==0
addProductToCart in CartServiceImpl only works when item already in cart (no-op if item missing — no INSERT in that path)
Stock overflow triggers DemandBean creation in BOTH AddtoCart and UpdateToCart servlets
DBUtil uses singleton Connection pattern; closeConnection(Connection) is a no-op (commented out)
Session validation: AddtoCart checks usertype=='customer'; UpdateToCart only checks username/password
